title: premium OEM quality made In Germany dust bags Compatible With Miele hoover bags Complete C2 Complete C3 Classic C1, S8, S5, S2 GN Type vacuum cleaners & Rainbow Vacuum Cleaner Bag Air Fresheners
features: Qpro premium OEM quality made In Germany dust bags, Provides nine layers of filtration that retains more fine dust and small particles than a conventional dust bag .
Qpro Microfibre Vacuum Cleaner Dust bags Compatiable With Miele Complete C2, Complete C3, Classic C1, S8, S5, S2 GN Type vacuum cleaners with Qpro Rainbow Vacuum Cleaner Bag Air Fresheners -

Qpro Dust bags with 3D technology x4 bags, 2 Filters & 5 Qpro Rainbow Air Fresheners all with a unique smell- Green Apple, Strawberry Rose, Blue Ocean Fresh, Yellow Lemon Fresh, Mellow Lavender Purple.
Auto-shut mechanism which automatically closes the bag when the vacuum cleaner is opened, meaning you won't be exposed to unhygienic dirt.
For the best results from your Miele vacuum cleaner, use these Qpro dust bags and enjoy high performance and maximum efficiency.
Compatiable with Miele Models S2, S5, S8, Classic C1, Complete C2 and Complete C3 models, or any Miele machine that uses the blue collar bag. Equivalent to bag type GN, hyclean or 9917730.
Please note this product is not manufactured by Miele, but it is designed to be compatible with Miele Vacuum Cleaners. The Miele name and part numbers have been used for reference purposes only.
